title: lasianthus subglobosus
intro: Lasianthus subglobosus, also known as the Chinese mountain tea or red tea, is a plant species in the family Theaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lasianthus subglobosus include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in digestion, as well as acting as an antimicrobial agent to prevent infections. Herbal preparations of Lasianthus subglobosus can be consumed as a tea or used in capsules, and it is also sometimes used as an ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
